prompt: Create a single high-detail fantasy trading card in a dark Warhammer-inspired style, full portrait orientation, with an ornate aged metal-and-red leather frame, distressed gold trim, and readable printed card text. The card title at the top reads GROKTHAR in large serif capitals, with the subtitle "Orc Warchief" centered below it. The main artwork shows a massive green-skinned orc war chief charging forward through a fiery battlefield, wearing brutal blackened spiked armor with skull motifs, leather straps, tusks, and blood-red war paint, one arm thrust forward as if commanding the attack and the other gripping a huge jagged battle axe. His physique is extremely muscular, with a savage snarling expression, long dark hair tied back, and a war-torn red-black color palette. The background is filled with smoke, embers, banners, silhouettes of warriors, and orange firelight. In the top left corner place a circular skull faction emblem. In the top right corner place a red vertical banner tab with a black tribal insignia. Along the left edge, stack exactly 4 circular stat icons in separate panels with values: sword attack 4, shield defense 3, heart health 5, boot movement 2. At the bottom, include a large parchment-colored text box with exactly 2 named abilities and 1 flavor quote. Ability 1 title: BRUTAL STRIKE, with body text: "When Grokthar attacks, he deals +2 damage." Ability 2 title: RALLY THE HORDE, with body text: "Once per turn, when another friendly Orc enters the battlefield, Grokthar gains +1 attack until end of turn." Beneath them, add the italic flavor quote: Strength is law. Blood is proof. The weak serve. The strong rule. In the bottom left corner place a red gem-like cost badge with the number 5. In the bottom right corner place a round crossed-weapons icon. Along the bottom type line, center exactly 3 class words separated by dots: "Ally • Orc • Warrior". Make the card look like a professionally printed collectible card game piece with crisp typography, balanced layout, dramatic fantasy illustration, rich texture, and authentic tabletop TCG design.
